---
title: "Courses"
format: html
---

## Properties of Biomaterials - EBM 301 (2026)

[Course Website](courses/ebm301/biomaterials.qmd)

## Biomechanics I - EBM 403 (2026)

[Course Website](courses/ebm403/biomechanics.qmd)

## R for Novices (Coming soon)

## Sample STEM Courses

[Biostatistics Primer]()

[Data Structures for Bioinformatics]()

## STEM Pedagogy

[Developing computational research skills]()

[Minimizing cognitive overload]()
